briefdescription.para: Sets up all of the game components and prepares the game.
A helper function that initialises the cards. The cards are put into three separate decks that are unshuffled.
A helper function that shuffles the three decks, and draws one card from each, and setting the contents of the murderEnvelope.
Helper function to setup the main deck. Should only be called AFTER setting up Murder Envelope.
Helper function to add all cards from one deck into another.
Moves to the next player, and starts the next turn.
Ends the game and announces the winner.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the player who made the suggestion.
The Suggestion class is used to represent the Accusation.

briefdescription.para: Class GameController controls the flow of the game, including the setup, turns and win conditions.
